creator: mack@ifis.cs.tu-bs.de
text:
Now I get:

ba-admin#:~> phantomjs --version
/usr/local/lib/libpng16.so.16: version PNG16_0 required by /usr/local/bin/phantomjs not defined
ba-admin#:~> 

Don't quite understand what it means; libpng16.so.16 does not contain PNG16_0 version? Where do I get it else?
